name: construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month, inefficient drawing conversion causes delays in project timelines. We automate the conversion instead of manual drawing interpretation and form filling.
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of architectural drawings into permit application forms.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient conversion of architectural drawings into permit application forms.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual drawing interpretation and form filling

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month, inefficient drawing conversion causes delays in project timelines. We automate the conversion instead of manual drawing interpretation and form filling.
